response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match for this Senior Fullstack role with 15+ years of experience, deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple production environments, and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators. His AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and MongoDB exposure covers most of the required secondary stack. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js experience and no mention of Vitest, Jest, or Playwright by name — though his extensive TDD advocacy and authorship of D-language testing frameworks signal strong testing fundamentals. The ETH Zürich CS degree and breadth of domains (web, embedded, mobile, GIS) reinforce engineering depth.
strengths: TypeScript/Node.js expertise across multiple senior roles with production-scale systems (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic, millions of mails at Optilyz)
Active AI-agent infrastructure contributor at re:cinq, including MCP framework work — directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored Fluent-Asserts and Trial (a full test runner), ran TDD/testing workshops
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere in the resume, creating uncertainty about familiarity with the primary backend framework
Vitest, Jest, and Playwright are not named explicitly, leaving the depth of JS/TS testing toolchain experience unverified
Kotlin is absent from the resume despite being a secondary stack requirement; only Java appears, and only in older embedded/robotics contexts
